title: Cholavandān Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Cholavandān, with a Z-Score of +4.54. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Cholavandān is causing extremely high temperatures, with a CDD of 14.9 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 54%, and the wind speed is 3.3 km/h, exacerbating the heat. 
 The HDD is at 0.0 GG, indicating no heating degree days, and the focus is on cooling.
conclusion: Implement emergency heat wave protocols immediately.
